headline: US-Iran clash over Strait of Hormuz escalates for 3rd day; Brent near 1-month high
gist: US naval blockade on Iranian shipping via Hormuz; Iran strikes tankers and a Kuwaiti platform; strait traffic down ~60%.

headline: Cooler US CPI revives Fed rate-cut bets; gold holds >1% gain near $4,040
gist: Core CPI 2.6% YoY, softer DXY; gold supported by rate-cut repricing and Hormuz-driven safe-haven demand, though pulled back below overnight VWAP.

headline: Henry Hub near 2-month low on oversupply and Freeport LNG maintenance
gist: Nat gas ~$2.91, rising output, milder demand outlook, Freeport LNG maintenance curbing export flows.

headline: GIFT Nifty points flat-to-negative despite firm US/Asia close; oil risk offsets
gist: S&P +0.4%, Nikkei +0.9% overnight but Hormuz oil-import cost risk caps the positive read-through for Nifty open.

headline: FII/DII flows: FIIs net sellers, DIIs net buyers in Tuesday cash session
gist: FII net sold Rs 740cr, DII net bought Rs 2,928cr; India VIX moderate at 13.8.
